ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "men_population" INTEGER /* Number of men in the county */,
  "women_population" INTEGER /* Number of women in the county */,
  "land_area" REAL /* Land area of the county in square miles */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the county in people per square mile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "hispanic_population" REAL /* Percentage of Hispanic population */,
  "white_population" REAL /* Percentage of White population */,
  "black_population" REAL /* Percentage of Black population */,
  "native_population" REAL /* Percentage of Native American population */,
  "asian_population" REAL /* Percentage of Asian population */,
  "pacific_population" REAL /* Percentage of Pacific Islander population */,
  "other_races_population" REAL /* Percentage of other races population */,
  "mixed_races_population" REAL /* Percentage of mixed races population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_age_citizens" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "voting_age_citizens" INTEGER /* Number of citizens of voting age in the county */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the county */,
  "voter_turnout" REAL /* Voter turnout in the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_data" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median household income */,
  "median_income_error" INTEGER /* Margin of error for median household income */,
  "income_per_capita" INTEGER /* Income per capita */,
  "income_per_capita_error" INTEGER /* Margin of error for income per capita */,
  "gini_coefficient" REAL /* Gini coefficient for income inequality */,
  "family_median_income" INTEGER /* Median family income */,
  "family_median_income_error" INTEGER /* Margin of error for median family income */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poverty_data" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Percentage of population living in poverty */,
  "child_poverty_rate" REAL /* Percentage of children living in poverty */,
  "poverty_gap_index" REAL /* Poverty gap index */,
  "families_below_poverty" INTEGER /* Number of families below poverty level */,
  "individuals_below_poverty" INTEGER /* Number of individuals below poverty level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_data" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "professional_employment" REAL /* Percentage of population employed in professional services */,
  "service_employment" REAL /* Percentage of population employed in service industries */,
  "office_employment" REAL /* Percentage of population employed in office work */,
  "construction_employment" REAL /* Percentage of population employed in construction */,
  "production_employment" REAL /* Percentage of population employed in production */,
  "agriculture_employment" REAL /* Percentage of population employed in agriculture */,
  "mining_employment" REAL /* Percentage of population employed in mining */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transportation_data" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "drive_alone" REAL /* Percentage of population driving alone to work */,
  "carpool" REAL /* Percentage of population carpooling to work */,
  "public_transit" REAL /* Percentage of population using public transit to work */,
  "walk" REAL /* Percentage of population walking to work */,
  "other_transportation" REAL /* Percentage of population using other transportation methods */,
  "work_at_home" REAL /* Percentage of population working at home */,
  "mean_commute_time" REAL /* Mean commute time in minutes */,
  "commute_time_60_plus_minutes" REAL /* Percentage of population with commute time over 60 minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "labor_force_data" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "total_employed" INTEGER /* Total number of employed individuals */,
  "private_employment" REAL /* Percentage of employed individuals in private sector */,
  "public_employment" REAL /* Percentage of employed individuals in public sector */,
  "self_employment" REAL /* Percentage of self-employed individuals */,
  "family_employment" REAL /* Percentage of individuals employed by family members */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate */,
  "labor_force_participation_rate" REAL /* Labor force participation rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "source_data" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date the data was collected */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_source_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the county data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the county data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_downloaded" INTEGER /* Indicates if data was downloaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation event */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date of the validation */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Status of the validation (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "validation_message" TEXT /* Message describing the validation result */,
  "validation_score" REAL /* Validation score (e.g., 0-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_data" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "high_school_graduates" REAL /* Percentage of population with high school diploma or higher */,
  "bachelor_degree_holders" REAL /* Percentage of population with bachelor's degree or higher */,
  "graduate_degree_holders" REAL /* Percentage of population with graduate degree or higher */,
  "education_attainment_index" REAL /* Index of education attainment (e.g., 0-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)
